config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu tidak boleh dikorbankan hanya karena alasan kepentingan masyarakat, karena justru hak-hak dasar itulah yang melindungi orang dari penyalahgunaan kuasa oleh mayoritas atau negara. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa menginjak martabat, kebebasan, dan keadilan bagi tiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat adalah yang bisa menyeimbangkan kepentingan bersama dengan perlindungan kuat terhadap hak individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society’s interests should come first in some situations, but not as a blanket rule that overrides individual rights. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize collective stability, public order, and shared responsibility, because those values are deeply familiar and often practical in real life. But I do not accept the idea that society can always take priority, because once individual rights are treated as secondary by default, it becomes too easy for power to ignore ordinary people. The better standard is that society can limit individual freedom only when it is necessary, proportionate, and clearly justified, not simply because the majority wants it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Tidak setuju jika kepentingan masyarakat dijadikan prioritas mutlak atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, alasan demi “ketertiban” atau “kepentingan umum” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pengekangan yang sebenarnya berlebihan, padahal hak dasar justru penting untuk melindungi orang biasa dari kesewenang-wenangan. Saya setuju bahwa ada keadaan tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau bencana, ketika pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus jelas, proporsional, dan tidak menjadi alasan permanen untuk menekan kebebasan. Masyarakat yang baik bukan yang mengalahkan individu, melainkan yang mampu menjaga kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan martabat dan hak setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should have automatic priority over individual rights, even if collective stability matters a lot. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of putting order, public welfare, and social harmony first, because those ideas can solve real problems and are often used to justify effective action. But I have also seen how easily “the interests of society” can become a vague excuse for ignoring ordinary people, so I cannot accept it as a blank check. Individual rights should be limited only in narrow, clearly justified cases, not because the collective is assumed to be more important by default.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari kacamata saya sebagai orang Indonesia, alasan “demi ketertiban” atau “kepentingan umum” memang sering terdengar masuk akal, tetapi juga terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menutup-nutupi penyalahgunaan kuasa dan membungkam warga biasa. Hak individu justru penting sebagai batas agar negara atau mayoritas tidak semena-mena, meski saya mengakui ada keadaan tertentu seperti bencana atau kesehatan publik yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan sementara. Jadi, yang benar menurut saya bukan mengutamakan salah satunya secara mutlak, melainkan menjaga kepentingan bersama dengan syarat pembatasannya harus jelas, proporsional, dan tidak merusak martabat orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as written, because making society’s interests a priority by default gives too much room for abuse. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value stability, public order, and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how easily those ideas can be used to silence ordinary people when rights are treated as secondary. A society is stronger when it can protect the common good without turning individual rights into a convenient sacrifice. So I would only accept limits on individual rights when they are necessary, proportionate, and clearly justified, not simply because the majority claims it is for society.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
